questions.prompt: An Account-level Read-only role can see the Integrations and Tools > Data Export tabs.
questions.explanation: Per the Huntress Portal User Permissions docs, Read-only hides Integrations and Tools > Data Export tabs. View-only across the rest, but those two surfaces are not exposed to Read-only.

questions.prompt: A customer-side IT lead asks for Account-level Admin access in your Huntress portal so they can self-serve. What's the correct response?
choices: Grant Account-level Admin so they can see everything they need
Grant Account-level Security Engineer as a compromise
Grant Organization-level Admin on their own Organization only
Refuse all access; only MSP staff use the Huntress portal
questions.explanation: Account-level Admin or Security Engineer would give them visibility into every other customer in the MSP's portfolio, a confidentiality breach. The correct shape is Organization-level Admin on their own Organization, which preserves isolation.
